untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specific chart pattern identification (380 patterns from Bulkowski data, mid-1991) which cannot be algorithmically expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. Pattern recognition requires visual/morphological analysis. Breakout conditions modeled using Donchian channels as proxy for pattern boundary breakouts, but exact pattern formation detection is not translatable.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as a mechanical proxy for bullish/bearish breakout detection in trending markets. Source data shows 92 bull-up, 37 bear-up, 186 bull-down, 65 bear-down formations. Performance metrics (29% average rise, 41% busted patterns) cannot be enforced as entry conditions but should inform position sizing. Signal is context-dependent across all four market regimes per original data.
